title: Alternatives to Gumroad's Payout Delays: What Nobody Tells You Before You Choose — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: You're a digital creator in Nigeria trying to sell your ebooks on Gumroad, but the platform's payout delays have put a wrench in your plans. Or perhaps you're in Ghana or Pakistan and Stripe's restrictions are blocking your sales. This is a problem most creators face when their country is on the restricted list of PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, or Payhip. But what if you didn't have to deal with these limitations? What if you could sell your digital products without waiting for weeks or even months to get paid? This post will explore the alternatives to Gumroad's payout delays, giving you the freedom to sell your creations and get paid instantly, without relying on these restricted payment processors.
What Each Option Actually Offers

Gumroad and Payhip offer a range of features for creators, including sales tracking, customer management, and delivery automation. However, their restricted country list and payout delays make them a poor choice for many creators. Stripe, while a popular payment processor, also has its limitations, particularly for creators in Nigeria, Ghana, and Pakistan. In contrast, the Core Shop Engine offers a full backend with bot engine, automated delivery, payment verification, and PDF receipts, all without requiring a payment processor account. This means you can sell your digital products without worrying about restrictions or delays, and get paid instantly.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip all have their own restricted country lists, which can be frustrating for creators in these regions. PayPal's list includes Nigeria, Ghana, and Pakistan, among others, while Stripe's restrictions are more widespread. In contrast, the Core Shop Engine works everywhere, without any restrictions or delays. This means you can sell your digital products to customers in any country, without worrying about whether they're on a restricted list.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

Gumroad's payout delays can range from weeks to months, while Stripe's fees can be up to 2.9% + 30 cents per transaction. In contrast, the Core Shop Engine offers instant payment verification, no fees, and no payout delays. This means you can get paid instantly for every sale, without incurring unnecessary fees or waiting for weeks to get your money.
Gumroad's payout delays can take weeks or even months to process.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

The Core Shop Engine offers automated delivery, payment verification, and PDF receipts, making it easy to sell and deliver your digital products. This means you can focus on creating more content, without worrying about the logistics of sales and delivery. In contrast, Gumroad and Payhip require more manual effort to manage sales and delivery, which can be time-consuming and frustrating.

If you're a digital creator in a restricted country, or if you're tired of Gumroad's payout delays, the Core Shop Engine is the perfect alternative.
